parameters.query:
-- Load active launches needing observation
SELECT 
  l.id AS launch_id,
  l.company_id,
  l.launch_date,
  l.launch_type,
  l.launch_title,
  l.initial_messaging,
  l.initial_pricing,
  l.weeks_tracked,
  EXTRACT(DAYS FROM (CURRENT_DATE - l.launch_date)) / 7 AS current_weeks
FROM launch_tracker.launches l
WHERE l.tracking_status = 'active'
  AND (
    NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM launch_tracker.decay_observations
      WHERE launch_id = l.id
    )
    OR (
      SELECT MAX(observation_date) FROM launch_tracker.decay_observations
      WHERE launch_id = l.id
    ) < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
  )
ORDER BY l.launch_date DESC;

-- Get current homepage snapshot for comparison
SELECT 
  ps.id AS snapshot_id,
  ps.content_hash,
  pf.h1_text,
  pf.cta_labels
FROM public.page_snapshots ps
LEFT JOIN public.page_features pf ON pf.snapshot_id = ps.id
JOIN public.tracked_pages tp ON tp.id = ps.tracked_page_id
WHERE tp.company_id = '{{ $json.company_id }}'::UUID
  AND (tp.page_type = 'homepage' OR tp.url NOT LIKE '%/%/%')
ORDER BY ps.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

-- Count homepage changes since launch
SELECT COUNT(*) AS homepage_change_count
FROM public.page_diffs pd
JOIN public.page_snapshots ps ON ps.id = pd.new_snapshot_id
JOIN public.tracked_pages tp ON tp.id = ps.tracked_page_id
WHERE tp.company_id = '{{ $('Load Active Launches').item.json.company_id }}'::UUID
  AND (tp.page_type = 'homepage' OR tp.url NOT LIKE '%/%/%')
  AND pd.created_at >= '{{ $('Load Active Launches').item.json.launch_date }}'::DATE;

-- Count pricing changes since launch
SELECT COUNT(*) AS pricing_change_count
FROM pricing_tracker.pricing_changes pc
WHERE pc.company_id = '{{ $('Load Active Launches').item.json.company_id }}'::UUID
  AND pc.detected_at >= '{{ $('Load Active Launches').item.json.launch_date }}'::DATE;

-- Get observation details to check if signal should be emitted
SELECT 
  do.id,
  do.decay_signal,
  do.signal_emitted
FROM launch_tracker.decay_observations do
WHERE do.id = '{{ $json.observation_id }}'::UUID;
